markdownRemark.html:
Project Description

Tartun ( Tarik Tunai ) is a software to allow you to withdraw money from MPOS Cashlez Device and anyone also can open their own money-withdrawal business in their home or place it in their existing business as a mPOS device.

What I did

This software uses other project code base.

  • Develop new mobile (Android) & Web Dashboard features
  • Deploy to VPS with Tomcat 9 as a Web Server
  • Manage SSL, Web Server, DNS and other server stuff.

Project Screenshots
